education_requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience)
experience_requirements: At least 2 years of experience in cloud computing, IT infrastructure, or systems administration.
soft_skills: Working knowledge of networking concepts such as subnets, firewalls, and routing
Knowledge on IAM, encryption, network security, and compliance standards
Cost and resource utilization and optimization of cloud solutions
Encourage innovation and continuous improvement in cloud delivery and operations
